TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Shareef_Abdur-Rahim, title = Shareef_Abdur-Rahim, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Shareef_Abdur-Rahim} }

S.FORM: Shareef Abdur-Rahim sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1976, ryax sa tay 11 nqu tay 12, Shareef Abdur-Rahim, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Shareef Abdur-Rahim sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1976, ryax sa tay 11 nqu tay 12, Shareef Abdur-Rahim, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: s~ɕħaree* aβ*ur-raħim s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj **, s~ɕħaree* aβ*ur-raħim, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
